commit.message:
Fix auth conflict on profile switch; update Codex model to gpt-5.1-codex

- Auto-logout from claude.ai when switching to work profile (prevents
  API key + oauth token conflict)
- Prompt to run `claude auth login` when switching to personal profile
  if not already authenticated
- Update Codex model from gpt-5.3-codex to gpt-5.1-codex per LogiQ docs
- Add LogiQ API reference section to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(db): add movies, books, reading_sessions tables (migration 004)

Root cause of books/movies not persisting: these Supabase tables
were never created. Both pages silently failed on upsert and returned
empty arrays on load.

Tables added:
- movies: id, user_id, tmdb_id, title, poster_path, release_year,
          hype, watched, added_at (BIGINT epoch ms)
- books:  id, user_id, ol_key, title, author, cover_id, total_pages,
          pages_read, status, notes, added_at, updated_at
          + set_updated_at() trigger (keeps homepage widget sorted)
- reading_sessions: id (identity), user_id, book_id (FK→books),
                    session_date, pages_read, notes

Migration applied to Supabase manually via SQL Editor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add smart coach dropdown to schedule dialog

When creating/editing a schedule, the coach dropdown now auto-fetches
only coaches that are available for the selected class, day, and time
(based on compensation rules, availability, and conflict detection).
Shows "Sin coach" option to allow creating schedules without a coach.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: hardcode Supabase URL/key fallback to fix production auth

regardless of env var injection. Anon key is public/client-side safe.

commit.message:
Fix parameter editing bugs: use actual net retention data and global physical adjusted value

- Replace hardcoded net retention constants (0.568/0.486/0.766) with per-country
  input data in cea.ts, fixing ~10x efficacy inflation for non-Chad countries
- Use global physical_protection_adjusted (from Chad durability calc) instead of
  per-country values, fixing ~2% error across all countries
- Fix reset button to restore pre-computed Python results instead of recalculating
- Thread global_physical_adjusted through data pipeline, hooks, and all pages
- Regenerate countries.json with global_physical_adjusted field

commit.message:
Remove ANTHROPIC_API_KEY injection from Claude settings

Injecting the LogiQ key as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY into settings.json causes
an auth conflict warning when using claude.ai login token. Claude auth
is handled separately (claude.ai session or API key directly), not via
settings.json env injection.

The LogiQ key is only needed for Codex (config.toml), not Claude.

commit.message:
fix: post-launch fixes — Cards nav, notifications schema, TMDb future-only, favicon

Fix 1 — Home nav: add 🃏 Cards link to sticky nav (was missing; all other pages
had it already). cards.html was the only page unreachable from the nav.

Fix 2 — Notifications: drop and recreate notifications table with full migration
002 schema. The table existed with a partial schema (missing hour, minute, days,
notif_type, group_label, label, title, body columns), so seedNotificationsIfEmpty()
silently failed and renderNotifModal() always showed "No schedule loaded". All 14
baseline rows now seeded and verified via REST API.

Fix 3 — Movies discovery: replace now_playing + upcoming (1 page each) with two
pages of upcoming filtered to release_date >= today. Drops movies that released
months ago; section title updated from "NOW PLAYING & COMING SOON" to "✨ COMING
SOON" to match the new intent.

Fix 4 — Favicon: add favicon.svg (💅 on #E84EA0 background, matching app palette)
and wire <link rel="icon"> + <link rel="apple-touch-icon"> into all 9 HTML files.
Replace favicon.svg with your preferred image to use the attached rainbow nails
sticker — link tags are already wired everywhere.

Previously, resume_parsed_at was written to wp_usermeta during parse.
If the response failed to reach the client (e.g. deploy restart), the
user was permanently locked out despite never receiving the parsed data.

Now: parse is allowed any time before DPR submission. Once DPR exists
in agzit_users.dpr_profile_id, parsing is blocked. This is the natural
one-time limit — no risk of orphaned locks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: filter out "ALL" classId when saving compensation rule

Selecting "Todas las clases" sent classId="ALL" to the API, which
tried to find a class with that ID and failed. Now correctly omits
classId when "Todas las clases" is selected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: wellness-platform
repository.description: Wellness center management platform - Next.js, Prisma, Stripe, AI insights

commit.message:
Fix cross-venue filter requiring all 3 DEXs instead of at least one

The opportunity detector required tokens to be listed on BOTH HyperLiquid
AND Paradex. If either API failed or a token wasn't on one venue, zero
opportunities were detected, cascading to empty vault and charts.

Changed to require GMX + at least one other venue (OR instead of AND).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove temp diagnostic endpoint after cleanup

Confirmed resume_parsed_at was present from a prior parse attempt
that succeeded server-side but failed client-side during deploy
restart. Cleared it successfully.

Auto-launch aiswitch after installation
